author: doll-agent
content: Added tests/api_proof.rs with 10 integration tests covering KernelRidge (every KernelType variant), Nystroem (every KernelType), RBFSampler, GaussianProcessRegressor (predict + predict_with_std + sample_y reproducibility + log_marginal_likelihood + score), GaussianProcessClassifier (predict + predict_proba + predict_log_proba + log_marginal_likelihood + score), full GP kernel zoo (RBF, Matern x3, Constant, White, DotProduct, Sum, Product), NadarayaWatson + LocalPolynomialRegression with the full local-kernel zoo (Gaussian, Epanechnikov, Tricube, Biweight, Triweight, Uniform, Cosine), bandwidth helpers (scott, silverman, all BandwidthStrategy variants), diagnostics (residual_diagnostics, heteroscedasticity_test with White + BreuschPagan). All 10 pass. Final ferrolearn-kernel test count: 232.
